A Dog’s Purpose (2017)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $64,321,890Details
International Box Office $138,733,537
Worldwide Box Office $203,055,427
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $13,015,071
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $6,602,157
Total $19,617,228
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The soulful and surprising story of one devoted dog who finds the meaning of his own existence through the lives of the humans he teaches to laugh and love.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$18,222,810 (28.3% of total gross)
Legs:3.53 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:31.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$25,000,000 (worldwide box office is 8.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,059 opening theaters/3,178 max. theaters, 5.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $85,762,517

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: January 27th, 2017 (Wide) by Universal
International Releases: January 20th, 2017 (Wide), released as Qua la zampa! (Italy)
January 26th, 2017 (Wide) (Brazil)
January 26th, 2017 (Wide) (Chile)
January 26th, 2017 (Wide) (Peru)
January 27th, 2017 (Wide), released as La Razón de Estar Contigo (Mexico)
Video Release: April 18th, 2017 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for thematic elements and some peril.
(Rating bulletin 2446 (Cert #50725), 10/12/2016)
Running Time: 100 minutes
Franchise: A Dog’s Purpose
Cast, crew, or production detail: Animal Lead, Same Role, Multiple Actors, Voiceover/Narration
Plot point: Coming of Age, Death of a Pet, Exes in Love, Reincarnation, Relationships Gone Wrong, Romance, Talking Animals
Social setting: Police life
Subgenre: Family Drama
Target audience: Family Movie
Time period setting: 1960s, 1970s, 1980s, 1990s, 2010s
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Amblin Entertainment, Reliance Entertainment, Walden Media, Pariah Productions
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

The soulful and surprising story of one devoted dog who finds the meaning of his own existence through the lives of the humans he teaches to laugh and love.
